questions.text: The normal temperature of human body is:
questions.explanation: The normal temperature of human body is 37°C (98.6°F). It is measured using a clinical thermometer.

questions.text: Heat flows from hot object to cold object.
questions.explanation: Heat always flows from a region of higher temperature to a region of lower temperature.

questions.correctAnswer: The process of heat transfer through a material without movement of particles.
questions.explanation: Conduction is the transfer of heat from hot end to cold end of a material without actual movement of particles.

questions.text: Land breeze blows from ________ to sea.
questions.explanation: Land breeze blows from land to sea during night. Sea breeze blows from sea to land during day.
